## FAQ
### Can I make a fork of this modpack?
Of course, if you add me to the credits!
### Can I run this modpack on mobile?
Sadly not, because this modpack made only for Minecraft Java Edition. But you can try running Helva Edition on PojavLauncher, MojoLauncher, ZalithLauncher ext. that made for mobile usage.
### Is the mods of this modpack yours?
Of course not, I just used the mods and don't think I made them. Thanks to the creators for the mods!
### How can I use and download the modpack?
You can just click download and select the latest version. You can use Prism Launcher, AT Launcher, Modrinth Launcher that supports .mrpack files.
### Is this modpack includes inappropriate content?
The purpose of this modpack is to turn Minecraft into a horror game. It may not be suitable for younger children.
### Is This Modpack Safe for My Device?
Of course! A script will copy your IP address and paste it onto a randomly generated sign in the game. I have no interest in stealing your personal data.
### How can I support you?
You don't have to send me money, and I dont want that. I just want you to download my modpack!
### What "Helva" Means?
Helva is a common dessert in T√ºrkiye, the Balkan countries and many Middle Eastern countries. 
### Why the Modpacks Name is "Helva Edition"
I thought that would be funny. If you search "Helva Edition" in Google you are mostly gonna see a turkish guy that plays horror mods in Minecraft. ( That guy is not me btw )


## STORY
A group of cult members decided to perform a ritual. They opened a portal between Earth and Hell. However, the devil punished the cult members and all of humanity. And everyone d#ed except you...
